notes: Logistics/support specialist Unique base — one instance on the map, sited on Plains, no terrain exception. Deliberately NOT a combat-first base: Supply Depot's entire 6-troop roster (Engineer, Ambulance, Transport Truck, Repair Truck, Mule, Volt Truck) is non-combat (damage 0, empty canTarget), so it produces no defenders of its own — Barracks and its Shielder line are included specifically so Camp Cozy isn't a total pushover garrison-wise, but it has no Missile Launcher (Turret + Walls only, deliberately lighter on fixed defense than other Unique bases too). Hospital is buildable here (unlike most bases) at a 25% discount (costModifiers, multiplier 0.75) — reinforcing the sustain identity alongside a 50% Wall cost discount (multiplier 0.5), making it cheap to wall in and keep supplied. Harbour/Port are also buildable given a Water-adjacent site, same caveat as Capital's. No specialty defense building, no resourceModifiers bonus — its whole identity is the cost discounts plus Supply Depot's roster, not raw output or damage.
